calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

Mei Hom, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Stanley Bandy, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant California Hydronics Corporation.
Default entered against defendant on November 20, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed June 9, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at Default Prove-Up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Stanley Bandy, and against the Defaulted Defendant: California Hydronics Corporation as follows:

Accrued Interest - $39.73.
Costs - $200.00, for a total of $239.73.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
